name: Microsoft / 微软
sector: Cloud, software and AI / 云、软件与 AI
summary: 微软通过 Azure 和 AI 服务消耗大规模 GPU 基础设施，是 NVIDIA 数据中心 GPU 需求的重要下游客户之一，同时也向企业客户转售 AI 算力和软件服务。 / Microsoft consumes large-scale GPU infrastructure through Azure and AI services, making it an important downstream customer for NVIDIA data-center GPUs while reselling AI compute and software services.
summaryZh: 微软通过 Azure 和 AI 服务消耗大规模 GPU 基础设施，是 NVIDIA 数据中心 GPU 需求的重要下游客户之一，同时也向企业客户转售 AI 算力和软件服务。
summaryEn: Microsoft consumes large-scale GPU infrastructure through Azure and AI services, making it an important downstream customer for NVIDIA data-center GPUs while reselling AI compute and software services.

updateCadence.最新动态: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每 12 小时

updateCadence.主营业务: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每周
updateCadence.供应链溯源: 暂不启用定时；计划启用后每周

business.description: 微软经营云服务、企业软件、生产力工具、游戏、搜索广告和 AI 平台，Azure 是其 AI 基础设施扩张核心。 / Microsoft operates cloud services, enterprise software, productivity tools, gaming, search ads, and AI platforms, with Azure central to AI infrastructure expansion.
business.descriptionZh: 微软经营云服务、企业软件、生产力工具、游戏、搜索广告和 AI 平台，Azure 是其 AI 基础设施扩张核心。
business.descriptionEn: Microsoft operates cloud services, enterprise software, productivity tools, gaming, search ads, and AI platforms, with Azure central to AI infrastructure expansion.
revenueModel: Windows 和设备 / Windows and devices

segments.name: Total revenue
segments.note: 批量自动稿仅使用可核对的总收入；分部收入拆分需要后续人工读取年报表格。

business.thesis: NVIDIA 相关性来自 Azure GPU 集群和 AI 服务需求；微软既是 NVIDIA 的大型客户，也是 AI 算力需求的聚合者。 / The NVIDIA linkage comes from Azure GPU clusters and AI service demand; Microsoft is both a large NVIDIA customer and an aggregator of AI compute demand.
business.thesisZh: NVIDIA 相关性来自 Azure GPU 集群和 AI 服务需求；微软既是 NVIDIA 的大型客户，也是 AI 算力需求的聚合者。
business.thesisEn: The NVIDIA linkage comes from Azure GPU clusters and AI service demand; Microsoft is both a large NVIDIA customer and an aggregator of AI compute demand.
riskNotes: AI 基础设施资本开支回报周期可能拉长。 / AI infrastructure capex payback periods may lengthen.
云竞争、监管和模型成本会影响利润率。 / Cloud competition, regulation, and model costs can affect margins.

themeExposure.rationale: Azure 采购和消耗 GPU 算力，但传导链条位于需求端，关系密切度低于制造和关键供给瓶颈。
themeExposure.rationaleZh: Azure 采购和消耗 GPU 算力，但传导链条位于需求端，关系密切度低于制造和关键供给瓶颈。
themeExposure.rationaleEn: Azure purchases and consumes GPU compute, but the transmission is on the demand side and less tight than manufacturing or critical supply bottlenecks.
